title: DEEPMARK Electronic Utility Lighter, BBQ Fire Lighters - Refillable Safety Gas Candle - For Kitchen, Barbecue, Candles, Camping, Cooking, BBQs- adjustable Flame, Electric Lighting Mechanism-PURPLE
features: Electric Spark Ignition: Enjoy a safe and reliable method of lighting without open flames or harmful fumes.
Refillable Design: Say goodbye to disposable lighters! This eco-friendly option uses readily available butane gas for extended use.
Adjustable Flame Control: Tailor the flame size to your specific needs, from delicate candle lighting to robust BBQ ignition.
Long, Flexible Wand: Reach difficult areas with ease thanks to the flexible wand, keeping your hands safely away from heat.

Windproof Design: No more struggling with windy conditions! This lighter stays lit even in gusts, ensuring consistent performance. Light candles, BBQs, fireplaces, stoves, campfires, and more with this one versatile tool.
description: Description: Revolutionize your lighting routine with the DEEPMARK Electronic Utility Lighter! Ditch the traditional lighters and embrace this innovative, flame-adjustable tool perfect for igniting BBQs, candles, fireplaces, and more. Featuring a safe and reliable electric lighting mechanism, this refillable lighter eliminates the need for open flames and messy fuels, ensuring peace of mind and effortless operation. Features: Safe and reliable electric spark ignition, no open flames. Eco-friendly and refillable with readily available butane gas. Adjustable flame size for precise control and diverse needs. Long, flexible wand for safe and convenient reach. Windproof design withstands challenging weather conditions. Perfect for BBQs, candles, fireplaces, stoves, camping, and more. DEEPMARK Electronic Utility Lighter is ideal for: Safety-conscious individuals who prefer flame-free lighting. Eco-friendly users seeking sustainable and reusable options. BBQ enthusiasts who require precise flame control. Outdoor adventurers who need a reliable lighter for camping. Anyone who desires a versatile and convenient tool for various lighting tasks. Specification: Packaged Dimensions: 24.8cm x 7cm x 2.4cm Packaged Weight: 0.055kg Materials: Plastic & steel
